name: XI - SAP PI Outbound Interface
description: Stubs a SAP PI/XI synchronous outbound interface. xi-ok returns an XI ApplicationResponse, xi-err returns a SOAP Fault.

config.response_body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soap:Body><soap:Fault><faultcode>soap:Server</faultcode><faultstring>XI_ROUTING_FAILED: No receiver could be determined for the message</faultstring></soap:Fault></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>
